name: aikit
description: MCP-backed skills and workflow plugins for MSP operations, vendor platforms, and knowledge workers.

plugins.name: auvik-network-ops
plugins.description: Network operations skills for Auvik-monitored infrastructure — triage alerts, hunt bandwidth hogs, and detect config drift.

plugins.name: brand-voice
plugins.description: Discover, enforce, and generate brand voice guidelines across all content.

plugins.name: cipp-m365-ops
plugins.description: M365 management skills for multi-tenant CIPP environments — tenant health sweeps, BEC incident response, and user offboarding.

plugins.name: connectwise-psa-ops
plugins.description: PSA skills for ConnectWise Manage — ticket triage, SLA breach monitoring, technician utilization, and project burn-down.

plugins.name: cowork-plugin-management
plugins.description: Create, customize, and manage Claude Code plugins inside the Cowork desktop environment.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, research customer questions, manage escalations, and build knowledge-base articles.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Explore datasets, write SQL queries, validate data quality, build visualizations, and generate interactive dashboards.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Review accessibility, critique designs, manage design systems, write UX copy, and synthesize user research.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Code review, system design, incident response, testing strategy, and tech-debt management for engineering teams.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Synthesize knowledge across enterprise sources — search, digest, and manage information from connected repositories.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Financial close, journal entry prep, reconciliation, variance analysis, financial statements, and SOX audit workflows.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Compensation benchmarking, recruiting pipeline, interview prep, org planning, people analytics, and handbook authoring.

plugins.name: kaseya-spanning-backup-ops
plugins.description: Backup operations skills for Kaseya Spanning Backup — sweep health, orchestrate restores, and audit seat utilization.

plugins.name: knowbe4-security-training
plugins.description: Security awareness skills for KnowBe4 — user risk heatmaps, phishing-failure cohorts, and campaign effectiveness deltas.

plugins.name: msp-command-center
plugins.description: Cross-platform MSP skills that fan out across all connected platforms — morning briefing, client 360, and incident response.

plugins.name: msp-tool-bridge-ops
plugins.description: Bridge skills for MSP workflows that cross platforms — ConnectWise tickets to NinjaOne telemetry and back.

plugins.name: ninjaone-rmm-ops
plugins.description: RMM skills for NinjaOne — fleet health sweeps, mass incident response, and offline device hunting across organizations.

plugins.name: nudge
plugins.description: Keep AI coding agents productive — detects when Codex, Claude Code, or Gemini CLI stalls in tmux and sends continuation signals.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Change management, process optimization, resource planning, risk assessment, and vendor management for operations teams.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Multi-agent coding orchestrator — drives whole-codebase build, fix, and audit work through subagents with real execution and independent verification.

plugins.name: paylocity-hr-ops
plugins.description: HR and payroll skills for Paylocity — roster snapshots, onboarding gap analysis, pay-rate audits, and deduction reviews.

plugins.name: pdf-viewer
plugins.description: View, annotate, and sign PDFs in a live interactive viewer — mark up contracts, fill forms, stamp approvals, and place signatures.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, synthesize user research, update stakeholders, and track the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Two-tier memory management and task tracking to make Claude a true workplace collaborator across projects and commitments.

plugins.name: threatlocker-zerotrust-ops
plugins.description: Zero-trust endpoint skills for ThreatLocker — approval request triage, forensic audit investigations, and multi-org block volume rollups.

plugins.name: vanta-compliance-ops
plugins.description: GRC skills for Vanta — framework audit readiness, missing evidence hunting, vendor risk rollups, and vulnerability triage.
